ec2.security.group.GroupDescription.Docs: A description for the security group. This is informational only.  Constraints: Up to 255 characters in length  Constraints for EC2-Classic: ASCII characters  Constraints for EC2-VPC: a-z, A-Z, 0-9, spaces, and ._-:/()#,@[]+=&;{}!$*

ec2.security.group.GroupName.Docs: The name of the security group.  Constraints: Up to 255 characters in length. Cannot start with `sg-`.  Constraints for EC2-Classic: ASCII characters  Constraints for EC2-VPC: a-z, A-Z, 0-9, spaces, and ._-:/()#,@[]+=&;{}!$*

ec2.security.group.SecurityGroupEgress.Docs: [VPC only] The outbound rules associated with the security group. There is a short interruption during which you cannot connect to the security group.

ec2.security.group.SecurityGroupIngress.Docs: The inbound rules associated with the security group. There is a short interruption during which you cannot connect to the security group.

ec2.security.group.Tags.Docs: Any tags assigned to the security group.

ec2.security.group.VpcId.Docs: [VPC only] The ID of the VPC for the security group.
